---
title: ""
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
#listing:
#  - id: future-activities
#    contents: engagements/future/*.qmd
#    type: grid
#    categories: true
#    sort: "date asc"
#    fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
#    page-size: 12
#  - id: past-activities
#    contents: engagements/past/*.qmd
#    type: grid
#    categories: true
#    sort: "date desc"
#    fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
#    page-size: 12
---

```{=html}

<div class="site-page">

<section class="site-intro">
  <div class="site-kicker">Events · Outreach · Public engagement</div>
  <h2>Engagements</h2>
  <div class="site-lede">
    <p>Selected talks, workshops, panels, podcasts, public programs, and other events where I share, test, and develop ideas with wider communities.</p>
    <p><span class="site-muted">This page is under construction.</span></p>
  </div>
</section>


<!--
<section class="site-section">
  <p>This page is collects talks, workshops, panels, podcasts, public programs, and other events I have participated in or will participate in.</p>
  <h2 class="site-section-title">Future activities</h2>
  {#future-activities}
  <h2 class="site-section-title">Past activities</h2>
  {#past-activities}
</section>
-->

</div>
```
